headline: MTG Throne 🏰💥 RACE RUNOFF: Trump-Endorsed Clay vs Dem Daddy Harris 🍊⚔️
text:
GA-14 🟦🍑 SPECIAL ELECTION GOES FULL RUNOFF MODE 🏃‍♂️💨 after NOBODY snagged 50%+ in TUESDAY NIGHT 🥳📊 BRAWL! Trump 🍊👑 ANOINTED Clay Fuller 🕵️‍♂️🔥 – ex-DA DAWG 🐶⚖️ who got that 'COMPLETE AND TOTAL ENDORSEMENT' 📱💥 on Truth Social, plus a ROME RALLY 🎉🇮🇹 last month to TIP THE SCALES ⚖️🍆! Fuller flexing HARD 😤: 'Y'all SEE how DJT 🐐 owns GA-14, the MAGA MOVEMENT, and this WHOLE DAMN COUNTRY 🇺🇸🦅?!' Now he's CLASHING 👊 with Dem Shawn Harris 🪖👨‍🌾 – retired Brig Gen FARMER DADDY 🌽💪 posting on X 🐦: 'Race AIN'T OVER BBY 👶, MOMENTUM REAL AF 🔥📈, COALITION GROWING 🍆👯!' Runoff DROPS April 7 🗓️💣 to FINISH MTG's TERM 🍑⏳.

MTG Marjorie Taylor Greene 🔥😈 – QUEEN of CONSPIRACY TEA ☕🛸, BOMBastic committee SLAYS 🔪🎤, HARDLINE BORDER BOSS 🚫🇲🇽 – DITCHED CONGRESS 🚪💨 after EPSTEIN FILES FEUD 💥📜 EXPLODED her Trump BROMANCE 👫🔥! Pushed that TRANSPARENCY ACT 🕵️‍♀️📋 thru despite Orange Man's 'NAH' 🙅‍♂️, he signed it anyway under PRESSURE SQUEEZE 😩💦 but they STAY SALTY 🧂😠 FOREVER! Post-office MTG's X RANTS 📱🚀 torching Trump for US-Israel IRAN SMACKDOWN 💥🇮🇷 – voters HIT POLLS 🗳️ with that DRAMA LOOMING 👻 like her GAWD-TIER PERSONA 🦸‍♀️🍑!

CROWDED AF FIELD 🏁 17 CANDIDATES 🤡🎪 – Trump SIMPS 🐑💕 flocked to Fuller cuz 'MORALS + MILITARY BADASS' 🇺🇸🪖 says voter Marsha Miles 🙌, tho she'd pick him ANYWAY! Colton Moore 🧔‍♂️🤠 – anti-ESTAB REBEL 😤🚫 – came THIRD 🥉 cuz he CHANNELS MTG VIBES without the QUITTER QUIT 😩🚪, per young gun Benito Rubino 🧒🔥: 'Colton = reliable TRUMP WARRIOR 🛡️🐐, MTG bailed TOO SOON 😤!' Dems DREAMING FLIP 💔🔄 with Harris – Sheila Hutchings 🌈 voting for 'POSITIVE VIBES ONLY 🥰🗣️, KIND WORDS for ALL SIDES ✌️!'

TUESDAY = EARLY TEST 🔥🧪 of Trump’s MIDTERM MOJO 💪📅 – can his ENDORSEMENT MAGIC 🪄🍊 OWN the HOUSE like he OWNS RALLIES 🎤🇺🇸?! GA VOTERS SPUN 🤤 from 17 OPTIONS, picking Trump LOYAL vs DEM FARM GEN – RUNOFF HYPE BUILDING ⬆️😍, WHO YA GOT BBY 👀💦? MAGA vs MOMENTUM, LET'S GOOO 🚀‼️
